caveats: Synthetic data: Not real PCam samples, generated for testing

No distribution shift: Train/test from same synthetic generation
Not comparable to published baselines: Different dataset scale
notes: Framework validation on synthetic PCam subset using the standard pcam.yaml config. Demonstrates end-to-end pipeline functionality including training convergence, checkpointing, early stopping, and evaluation metrics. NOT a scientific benchmark - used small synthetic data for rapid iteration. See PCAM_BENCHMARK_RESULTS.md for full details.
